mode_abc_reinterpretation.Mode A: Inspect and Validate - AI Request Inspector, capability validation, no network execution.
mode_abc_reinterpretation.Mode B: Preview, Authorize, and Execute Once - Generate preview, request explicit approval, bounded one-shot execution.
mode_abc_reinterpretation.Mode C: Package and Handoff to AI - Export canonical JSON/Markdown for AI conversational handoff.

responsibilities.Skill: Guide AI on WHEN to use project, generate valid M8R-05A requests based on user intent.
responsibilities.Project: Canonical execution within bounds, returning exhaustive result per M8R-05A schemas.
responsibilities.Frontend: Unified Market Evidence Workbench: Inspector, Preview, Gate, Result Explorer.

principles.complete_output: Exhaustive within the authorized request scope. No subjective trimming or implicit recommendation generation.
principles.portable_skill_sync: Generated snapshot from canonical repo schemas. Enforced via sync validator during CI/build.
